# Phase 4 — perimeter-target annotation applies direction to one
# perimeter edge and isn't dormant. Exercises:
#   - annotation directive with `on=perimeter` substrate
#   - annotations directive (dormant indices report)
#   - perimeter-target resolver round-trip through the pipeline

polygon outer
(0,0)
(240,0)
(240,160)
(0,160)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(240,160), area 38400

set stall-angle=90
----

annotation direction
on=perimeter loop=outer edge=2→3 t=0.5 traffic=one-way
----
annotation direction on=perimeter loop=outer edge=2→3 t=0.50 traffic=one-way

generate
----
total_stalls: 62
faces: 5 (boundary: 1, interior: 4)
graph: 10 vertices, 13 edges (perimeter: 10, interior: 3)
regions: 1

annotations
----
direction on=perimeter loop=outer edge=2→3 t=0.50 traffic=one-way
